functions.name: sorted
functions.description: Sorts an iterable and returns a new list.

functions.name: map
functions.description: Applies a function to each element of an iterable.

functions.name: filter
functions.description: Filters an iterable to find elements that satisfy a condition.

functions.name: enumerate
functions.description: Returns an iterator of index-value pairs.
functions.example: for i, v in enumerate(['a', 'b']): print(i, v)

functions.name: all
functions.description: Returns True if all elements are true.

functions.name: any
functions.description: Returns True if at least one element is true.

functions.name: reversed
functions.description: Returns an iterator in reverse order.

functions.name: zip
functions.description: Packs multiple iterables into a tuple iterator.

functions.name: sum
functions.description: Sum an iterable object.

functions.name: len
functions.description: Return the number of elements in an object.

functions.name: str.replace
functions.description: Replace a substring in a string.

functions.name: str.split
functions.description: Split a string into a list using the specified delimiter.

functions.name: str.join
functions.description: Join a list into a string using the specified delimiter.

functions.name: str.strip
functions.description: Remove whitespace characters from the beginning and end of a string.

functions.name: str.lower
functions.description: Convert a string to lowercase.

functions.name: str.upper
functions.description: Convert a string to uppercase.

functions.name: str.find
functions.description: Return the first index of a substring in a string.

functions.name: str.isdigit
functions.description: Determine whether a string is all digits.

functions.name: str.startswith
functions.description: Determine whether a string starts with a specified prefix.

functions.name: str.endswith
functions.description: Determine whether the string ends with the specified suffix.

functions.name: collections.Counter
functions.description: Count the number of occurrences of elements and return to dictionary form.

functions.name: collections.defaultdict
functions.description: Dictionary with default values.

functions.name: collections.namedtuple
functions.description: Create an immutable tuple with field names.

functions.name: DataFrame.groupby
functions.description: Group data by a column.

functions.name: DataFrame.apply
functions.description: Apply a function to rows or columns.

functions.name: DataFrame.fillna
functions.description: Fill missing values.

functions.name: DataFrame.dropna
functions.description: Delete rows with missing values.

functions.name: String.substring
functions.description: Returns a new string that is a substring of the current string.

functions.name: String.replace
functions.description: Replaces each substring of this string that matches the literal target sequence.

functions.name: String.split
functions.description: Splits this string around matches of the given regular expression.

functions.name: String.toLowerCase
functions.description: Converts all of the characters in this String to lower case.

functions.name: String.toUpperCase
functions.description: Converts all of the characters in this String to upper case.

functions.name: String.startsWith
functions.description: Tests if this string starts with the specified prefix.

functions.name: String.endsWith
functions.description: Tests if this string ends with the specified suffix.

functions.name: String.trim
functions.description: Returns a copy of the string, with leading and trailing whitespace omitted.

functions.name: Collections.sort
functions.description: Sorts the specified list into ascending order.

functions.name: Collections.reverse
functions.description: Reverses the order of the elements in the specified list.

functions.name: Collections.max
functions.description: Returns the maximum element of the given collection.

functions.name: Collections.min
functions.description: Returns the minimum element of the given collection.

functions.name: Collections.frequency
functions.description: Returns the number of elements in the specified collection equal to the specified object.

functions.name: stream.filter
functions.description: Returns a stream consisting of the elements that match the given predicate.

functions.name: stream.map
functions.description: Returns a stream consisting of the results of applying the given function to the elements of this stream.

functions.name: stream.collect
functions.description: Performs a mutable reduction operation on the elements of this stream.

functions.name: stream.sorted
functions.description: Returns a stream consisting of the elements of this stream, sorted.

functions.name: stream.count
functions.description: Returns the count of elements in this stream.

functions.name: stream.forEach
functions.description: Performs an action for each element of this stream.

functions.name: stream.reduce
functions.description: Performs a reduction on the elements of this stream using an associative accumulation function.

functions.name: Array.prototype.map
functions.description: Creates a new array populated with the results of calling a provided function on every element.

functions.name: Array.prototype.filter
functions.description: Creates a new array with all elements that pass the test implemented by the provided function.

functions.name: Array.prototype.reduce
functions.description: Applies a function against an accumulator to reduce the array to a single value.

functions.name: Array.prototype.forEach
functions.description: Executes a provided function once for each array element.

functions.name: Array.prototype.includes
functions.description: Determines whether an array includes a certain value among its entries.

functions.name: Array.prototype.find
functions.description: Returns the first element in the array that satisfies the provided testing function.

functions.name: Array.prototype.some
functions.description: Tests whether at least one element in the array passes the test.

functions.name: Array.prototype.every
functions.description: Tests whether all elements in the array pass the test.

functions.name: String.prototype.includes
functions.description: Determines whether one string may be found within another string.

functions.name: String.prototype.split
functions.description: Divides a String into an ordered list of substrings and returns them as an array.

functions.name: String.prototype.replace
functions.description: Returns a new string with some or all matches of a pattern replaced.

functions.name: String.prototype.toUpperCase
functions.description: Returns the calling string value converted to uppercase.

functions.name: String.prototype.toLowerCase
functions.description: Returns the calling string value converted to lowercase.

functions.name: String.prototype.trim
functions.description: Removes whitespace from both ends of a string.

functions.name: Math.max
functions.description: Returns the largest of zero or more numbers.

functions.name: Math.min
functions.description: Returns the smallest of zero or more numbers.

functions.name: Math.random
functions.description: Returns a pseudo-random number between 0 and 1.

functions.name: Math.floor
functions.description: Returns the largest integer less than or equal to a given number.

functions.name: Math.ceil
functions.description: Returns the smallest integer greater than or equal to a given number.

functions.name: Object.keys
functions.description: Returns an array of a given object's own enumerable property names.

functions.name: Object.values
functions.description: Returns an array of a given object's own enumerable property values.

functions.name: Object.entries
functions.description: Returns an array of a given object's own enumerable string-keyed property [key, value] pairs.

functions.name: JSON.stringify
functions.description: Converts a JavaScript object or value to a JSON string.

functions.name: JSON.parse
functions.description: Parses a JSON string, constructing the JavaScript value or object described by the string.

functions.name: std::sort
functions.description: Sorts the elements in a range into ascending order.

functions.name: std::reverse
functions.description: Reverses the order of the elements in a range.

functions.name: std::find
functions.description: Finds the first element in the range that is equal to the given value.

functions.name: std::count
functions.description: Returns the number of elements equal to a given value.

functions.name: std::accumulate
functions.description: Computes the sum (or another binary operation) of a range of elements.

functions.name: std::for_each
functions.description: Applies a function to each element in a range.

functions.name: std::string::find
functions.description: Finds the first occurrence of a substring in the string.

functions.name: std::string::substr
functions.description: Returns a substring starting from a given index.

functions.name: std::string::replace
functions.description: Replaces part of the string with another string.

functions.name: std::getline
functions.description: Reads characters from an input stream into a string until a newline is found.

functions.name: std::max
functions.description: Returns the greater of two values.

functions.name: std::min
functions.description: Returns the smaller of two values.

functions.name: std::abs
functions.description: Returns the absolute value of a number.

functions.name: std::pow
functions.description: Returns the base raised to the power exponent.

functions.name: std::sqrt
functions.description: Returns the square root of a number.

functions.name: std::stoi
functions.description: Converts a string to an integer.

functions.name: std::to_string
functions.description: Converts a number to a string.

functions.name: std::cin
functions.description: Standard input stream.

functions.name: std::cout
functions.description: Standard output stream.

functions.name: String::from
functions.description: Creates a `String` from a string literal.

functions.name: String::push_str
functions.description: Appends a string slice to a `String`.

functions.name: String::replace
functions.description: Replaces all matches of a pattern with another string.

functions.name: String::split
functions.description: Splits a string on a delimiter and returns an iterator.
functions.example: for part in s.split(",") { println!("{}", part); }

functions.name: i32::abs
functions.description: Returns the absolute value of an `i32` number.

functions.name: f64::sqrt
functions.description: Returns the square root of a float number.

functions.name: num::pow
functions.description: Raises a number to the power of another.

functions.name: iter.map
functions.description: Transforms each element of the iterator using a function.
functions.example: let v = vec![1, 2, 3]; let squares: Vec<_> = v.iter().map(|x| x * x).collect();

functions.name: iter.filter
functions.description: Filters elements that match a predicate.

functions.name: iter.fold
functions.description: Reduces the iterator to a single value.
functions.example: let sum = v.iter().fold(0, |acc, x| acc + x);

functions.name: iter.enumerate
functions.description: Creates an iterator that yields pairs (index, value).
functions.example: for (i, val) in v.iter().enumerate() { println!("{}: {}", i, val); }

functions.name: Vec::new
functions.description: Creates a new, empty vector.

functions.name: Vec::push
functions.description: Appends an element to the back of a vector.

functions.name: Vec::sort
functions.description: Sorts the elements of the vector in-place.

functions.name: Vec::contains
functions.description: Returns true if the vector contains the element.

functions.name: std::io::stdin().read_line
functions.description: Reads a line of input from the standard input.
functions.example: let mut input = String::new(); std::io::stdin().read_line(&mut input).unwrap();

functions.name: format!
functions.description: Formats a string using syntax similar to `println!`, but returns it.

functions.name: std::env::args
functions.description: Returns the arguments passed to the program.
functions.example: for arg in std::env::args() { println!("{}", arg); }

functions.name: strings.ToUpper
functions.description: Converts a string to uppercase.

functions.name: strings.ToLower
functions.description: Converts a string to lowercase.

functions.name: strings.Contains
functions.description: Checks if a substring exists within a string.

functions.name: strings.Split
functions.description: Splits a string into substrings based on a separator.

functions.name: strings.ReplaceAll
functions.description: Replaces all instances of a substring with another substring.

functions.name: math.Abs
functions.description: Returns the absolute value of a number.

functions.name: math.Pow
functions.description: Returns base raised to the power exponent.

functions.name: math.Sqrt
functions.description: Returns the square root of a number.

functions.name: math.Max
functions.description: Returns the larger of two numbers.

functions.name: math.Min
functions.description: Returns the smaller of two numbers.

functions.name: append
functions.description: Appends elements to a slice.

functions.name: copy
functions.description: Copies elements from one slice to another.
functions.example: src := []int{1, 2, 3}; dst := make([]int, len(src)); copy(dst, src);

functions.name: len
functions.description: Returns the length of a slice or array.

functions.name: cap
functions.description: Returns the capacity of a slice.

functions.name: go
functions.description: Starts a new goroutine (concurrent function).

functions.name: select
functions.description: Used to wait on multiple channel operations.

functions.name: time.Sleep
functions.description: Pauses execution for a specified duration.

functions.name: fmt.Println
functions.description: Prints a line to the standard output with a newline.

functions.name: fmt.Scanln
functions.description: Reads a line of input from the user.

functions.name: os.Open
functions.description: Opens a file and returns a file handle.
functions.example: file, err := os.Open("file.txt"); if err != nil { log.Fatal(err) }

functions.name: os.Create
functions.description: Creates a new file or truncates an existing file.

functions.name: string.ToUpper
functions.description: Converts a string to uppercase.

functions.name: string.ToLower
functions.description: Converts a string to lowercase.

functions.name: string.Contains
functions.description: Determines whether a substring exists within a string.
functions.example: string s = "hello world"; bool contains = s.Contains("world");

functions.name: string.Split
functions.description: Splits a string into an array of substrings based on a delimiter.

functions.name: string.Replace
functions.description: Replaces all occurrences of a substring with another substring.
functions.example: string s = "hello world"; string newStr = s.Replace("world", "C#");

functions.name: Math.Abs
functions.description: Returns the absolute value of a number.

functions.name: Math.Pow
functions.description: Returns the value of a number raised to a specified power.

functions.name: Math.Sqrt
functions.description: Returns the square root of a number.

functions.name: Math.Max
functions.description: Returns the larger of two numbers.

functions.name: Math.Min
functions.description: Returns the smaller of two numbers.

functions.name: List.Add
functions.description: Adds an element to the end of a list.

functions.name: List.Contains
functions.description: Determines whether an element is in the list.
functions.example: List<int> numbers = new List<int> { 1, 2, 3 }; bool contains = numbers.Contains(2);

functions.name: List.Sort
functions.description: Sorts the elements of the list in ascending order.

functions.name: List.Remove
functions.description: Removes the first occurrence of a specific object from the list.

functions.name: List.Count
functions.description: Returns the number of elements in the list.
functions.example: List<int> numbers = new List<int> { 1, 2, 3 }; int count = numbers.Count();

functions.name: File.ReadAllText
functions.description: Reads the contents of a file as a string.

functions.name: File.WriteAllText
functions.description: Writes a string to a file, creating the file if it doesn't exist.

functions.name: File.Exists
functions.description: Determines whether the file exists.

functions.name: File.AppendAllText
functions.description: Appends text to an existing file.

functions.name: Directory.CreateDirectory
functions.description: Creates a new directory.

functions.name: Task.Run
functions.description: Runs a method asynchronously in a new task.

functions.name: async
functions.description: Declares a method as asynchronous.
functions.example: public async Task MyMethod() { await Task.Delay(1000); }

functions.name: await
functions.description: Waits for the completion of an asynchronous operation.

functions.name: CancellationTokenSource.Cancel
functions.description: Cancels a cancellation token.
